cybersec.name: CyberSecSuite
cybersec.description: Main forensics MCP — 29 tools: findings, IOCs, cases, MITRE, CVE, intel, cache, proxy, crypto (stdio, FastMCP)

dystopian-crypto.name: Dystopian Crypto
dystopian-crypto.description: Ed25519 key management, artifact signing/verification (Argon2id + AES-256-GCM)
args: import asyncio; from mcp.dystopian import dystopian_server; asyncio.run(dystopian_server.run_stdio())

token-optimization-mcp.name: Token Optimization MCP
token-optimization-mcp.description: Token counting, prompt compression, model routing and semantic caching (fastmcp, Redis-backed)

playwright-stealth-mcp.name: Playwright Stealth MCP
playwright-stealth-mcp.description: Headless Brave browser with fingerprint spoofing, anti-detection and human-like interaction (navigate, click, type, screenshot)

kerneldev.name: KernelDev MCP
kerneldev.description: Kernel module development — compile, load, inspect LKM; eBPF program analysis; kernel symbol lookup
